heading: Presidential inaugural transitions
label: 3349a Presidential inaugural transitions
notes: Effective DateSection effective 30 days after , and applicable to any office that becomes vacant after such effective date, with certain exceptions, see , set out as a note under .Oct. 21, 1998section 151(d) of Pub. L. 105–277section 3345 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: In this section, the term “transitional inauguration day” means the date on which any person swears or affirms the oath of office as President, if such person is not the President on the date preceding the date of swearing or affirming such oath of office.
90 days after such transitional inauguration day; or
90 days after the date on which the vacancy occurs.
